title: Bare Bones Better Grass
description: Add flowers and plants textures to the normal grass texture
body:
Adds flowers, rocks, clovers, podzol, and mycelium block in the Barebone style, it doesn't need any mod whatsoever. This was made before the "Bare Bones Grass Flowers" by 2DWisp so don't get mistaken.
**
CREDIT TO JAMIECLUBED FOR THE BASE PACK
**
